name: flutter-cockpit
description: AI-first Flutter runtime control, host control, evidence, and validation workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Control and verify Flutter apps with live evidence.
interface.longDescription: Flutter Cockpit gives AI agents a fast app-first loop for launching, inspecting, controlling, capturing, recording, and validating Flutter apps and host surfaces.
defaultPrompt: Use Flutter Cockpit to verify this Flutter change.
Launch the app, inspect state, and capture proof.
Run the smallest live validation loop.
